arts.ttl: Wolves v Newcastle team news: Hall starts, Barnes a sub
arts.sum: The line-ups from Molineux The post Wolves v Newcastle team news: Hall starts, Barnes a sub appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Wolves see first win of PL season against Newcastle
arts.sum: All the latest from Molineux as Wolves look to grab their first three points of the season - Newcastle stand in their way. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe told to make three big Newcastle United changes for Wolves test
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans XI vs Wolves: Pope, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton, Barnes, Gordon, Isak. Newcastle United may be unbeaten heading into today's test against Wolves, but Magpies fans would still make THREE changes to the starting lin-up at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United aiming for 'blockbuster' announcement after worrying Alexander Isak talk
arts.sum: When asked about Isak's importance to United, amid reports of a new deal, Howe said this week: "He's one (of Newcastle's most important players) of, for sure. Howe told Chronicle Live: "Every striker, attacking player, has that need and want to score goals and he will feel good about himself, no doubt.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer rumours with Everton linked with shock move after Pickford decision
arts.sum: Newcastle United could face surprise interest in goalkeeper Nick Pope in the January transfer, with Everton reportedly reading to make an offer for the England shot-stopper. The 25-year-old has three goals in three Bundesliga appearances already for Frankfurt this season, but could well be the subject of bids again in January.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Eddie Howe agree on Anthony Gordon 'dream' that will benefit Newcastle United
arts.sum: However, new England boss Lee Carsley showed his faith in the United star in their two wins over Ireland and Finland last week, something which Newcastle head coach Eddie Howe and goallscoring legend Alan Shearer feel came at a good time for the 23-year-old. Anthony Gordon is 'committed' to the Newcastle United cause after a welcome morale boost on England duty this week.

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Wolves vs Newcastle kicks off at 4.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 4pm. Wolves are back home to face Newcastle United in the Premier League this afternoon - find out how to follow the live action below.

arts.ttl: Tonali can bring much-needed energy to Newcastle midfield
arts.sum: Tonali's average speed of 7.28km/h was by far the highest of any Newcastle player in that match and his 124 intensive sprints were the most made while he was on the pitch. He averaged 12km per 90 minutes during the early stage of 2023/24, while also making more sprints and pressures than any other player in the Newcastle midfield.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United activate recruitment plan to resolve Eddie Howe and Paul Mitchell tensions
arts.sum: Howe could have ignored some of Mitchell's remarks about the scouting set-up at Newcastle United when asked on Friday but did not hold back when giving a perfectly reasonable response to the former Monaco's supremo's view that the recruitment department was not "fit for purpose". But it has to be collaboration, that's the key thing, giving your views together for the best thing for the football club.

arts.ttl: Gary O'Neil gushes over Newcastle United star as Wolves target Premier League revival
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil is acutely aware of the danger Isak and Newcastle will pose as they look to move out of the Premier League relegation zone after recording just one point from three matches so far. Newcastle United talisman Alexander Isak has been singled out for special praise on the eve of the Magpies trip to Wolverhampton Wanderers.
